message:
refactor(google-places,synology-chat): standardize error handling and client types

Implement ConnectorErrorMapping trait for google-places with retryability
detection for 429/5xx status codes. Add Internal error variant and
comprehensive error classification tests.

Restructure synology-chat client with typed message requests, dispatch
results, and proper validation. Add response normalization with retry
header handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-//! Synology Chat connector entrypoint.
+//! `Synology Chat` connector entrypoint.
 
 #![forbid(unsafe_code)]
